name: Jarrod'sTech
oneLine: Australian gaming-laptop reviewer focused on rigorous, repeatable benchmark methodology and large comparison datasets.
bio: Jarrod'sTech is a YouTube channel and companion site (jarrods.tech) dedicated to gaming-laptop reviews and benchmark comparisons. New laptops are tested weekly on a standardised pipeline measuring performance, thermals, battery life, and fan noise, and results are catalogued on the website for cross-model comparison. The channel is known for sweeping multi-GPU comparison videos, including one testing 34 laptop and desktop GPUs across 25 games at 1080p, 1440p, and 4K.
topics: laptop GPU vs desktop GPU comparisons
style: data-dense, chart-heavy benchmark reviews with consistent test methodology and minimal hype
